text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory and I head into town to watch a
kendo tournament.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory uses her kendo experience to
provide passionate commentary, all the way up to
the finals.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Man, that nukidou! Such a perfect body strike!
The final match definitely lived up to the hype!
Well then, wanna get go—
W-wait! You there!
Pant, pant... You're Bamboo, right?! Do you remember me?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh! Didn't you just win the tournament?!
Do we know each other?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...Ah! Don't tell me! Did we used to train at the
same dojo?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Wow, what a surprise! I didn't expect to run into
you here!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You moved away really suddenly, right? I was so
shocked because you left without saying
anything!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Childhood Friend
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, sorry about that. You had just started
racing and you seemed so busy. But also... I
couldn't bring myself to face you.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Childhood Friend
text_block_list.text:
...Back then, I wasn't able to be the person that
you wanted me to be.

text_block_list.name: Young Bamboo
text_block_list.text:
...And then after that, my dad swore to meet him
again in next year's finals!

text_block_list.name: Young Bamboo
text_block_list.text: Isn't that so cool?! I want a rival like that too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Childhood Friend
text_block_list.text:
But you were so strong. You progressed so
quickly that nobody else could compete!
Including me.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Childhood Friend
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't tell you back then, but I can now. Back
when you started racing... I thought it was
because all of us at the dojo were too weak for
you.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: N-no way! That's not true!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Childhood Friend
text_block_list.text:
...I was so determined to get stronger! Strong
enough to beat you! So... what do you say? Are
you willing to spar with me?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Of course! I'd be happy to!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They stop short of hitting each other because
they aren't wearing any guards, but their match is
so intense I hardly notice!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Holy cow! You've sure gotten strong!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Childhood Friend
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! Hehe. I guess we've both grown a lot
since back then.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Childhood Friend
text_block_list.text:
I watch all your races, so I've seen you getting
better as well. We might be on different paths
now, but let's both keep pushing ourselves!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Two rivals, fiercely competing as we push
forward on our separate paths!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory and her childhood friend
exchange a firm handshake before parting ways.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That was sooo intense! A reunion! A rematch! A
rekindled friendship! And to top it off, a vow of
rivalry! Talk about red-hot! I'M BURNING UP!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Raaaaah! I gotta pack all this passion into my legs
and blast it all out in a run!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff! Huff! Faster! Keep... moving... forward!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(I know this feeling—this irresistible feeling
boiling up inside me... I've felt it before, a long
time ago...)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(That's it. No matter how much I trained, I could
never get rid of it... My heart burned so hot, I was
running before I even realized it!)

text_block_list.name: Young Bamboo
text_block_list.text: ...Ngh. Further! I gotta go further! Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Young Bamboo
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff! Ahhh! This feels incredible!

text_block_list.name: Young Bamboo
text_block_list.text:
(Running feels great... That's it... Racing! I bet
that's where I can find a rival...)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(And I really did! I found the best rivals I could
ask for! And above all...)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Listen to this! I remembered
something amazing when I was running!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I left kendo for racing so I could find the best
rivals ever! And now I feel like that dream is
becoming reality!
choice_data_list: Then I bet beating them would really make your dream come true!
Let's stay on track and keep pressing forward.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yes! Let's get my old friend—no! Let's get everyone in the whole world on board with my dream!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Let's make it happen together, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory speaks with red-hot passion...
Yet again, my desire to support her on her racing
journey has been renewed.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Of course! If I hadn't entered the world of racing,
I wouldn't have met Oguri and all of my other
rivals. Not only that...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't have met you! You can look forward to
a whole lot of red-hot running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory speaks with red-hot passion...
Yet again, my desire to support her on her racing
journey has been renewed.
